description_long: This is a double-ended open wrench, featuring two U-shaped jaws at either end, each with a slightly different size. The body is long and slender, with a flat, uniform profile and a matte black finish. The jaws are fixed and not adjustable, designed for gripping and turning nuts or bolts of specific sizes. The handle is straight and tapers slightly toward the center, providing a balanced grip for manual use. There are no visible grip patterns, logos, or decorative elements, giving it a utilitarian and industrial appearance. The surface appears clean and free of rust or wear, suggesting it is either new or well-maintained.
description: A matte black, double-ended open wrench with fixed U-shaped jaws and a flat, slender body. The tool is utilitarian, clean, and free of visible markings or grip patterns.
description_view_0: End-on view showing one U-shaped jaw and the flat, wide profile of the wrench.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the wrench, both open jaws, and the straight, flat handle.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, similar to view 0, showing the other U-shaped jaw.
description_view_3: Side view identical to view 1, showing the full length and both jaws from the opposite side.
